characters.name: CeCe
characters.description: An extended shot of Spyler and CeCe. CeCeisSpyler's best friend and pet dog. Like Spyler, she is made of plasticine clay with orange building blocks and yellow and green paper dots on her. She talks, like Spyler. She has jokes for Spyler when they are around things that are in the game, jokes for when they are around things that are not in the game, jokes for when they are around what they use for a purpose and jokes for when they are around in places where the things in the game are.

characters.name: Spyler
characters.description: An extended shot of Spyler and CeCe. Spyleris one of the main characters inI Spy. He is a plasticine clay model with a tennis ball head, red pipe cleaner hair, green gloves for hands, a pink eraser, and buttons as feet. In every episode of the show, he andCeCehave to find four items. Gender: Male
